member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.Base.ConsoleLogger
member.summary: Utility methods for the whole service.

member.summary: Logs the applied Fivr domains to the console.

member.summary: Logs the applied timing attributes values to the console.

member.summary: Tries to get the index of a value in a List.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.Base.RepeatedHandler
member.summary: Class to manage one to one relationship (by index) between a list of names and values, where some names could be repeated.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.RepeatedHandler.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Prime.VoltageService.Base.RepeatedHandler.UniqueNames
member.summary: Gets Unique names.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.RepeatedHandler.GetResolvedValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Gets the proper resolved values.
member.exception: Throws if list of values is bigger than expected value size.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility
member.summary: Utility methods for the whole service.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.AreDoubleValuesEqual(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Indicates if two double values are equal or not.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.HasRepeated``1(System.Collections.Generic.ICollection{``0})
member.summary: Returns true if a list of elements has repeated elements.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.GetRepeatedBinaryString(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Gets a binary string repeated n times.
member.returns: New binary string repeated n times.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.GetBinaryValue(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: Converts a long value to binary string. Will cut resulting binary string if its too long.
member.returns: Binary string of maximum of expected size.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.PadBinaryStringToSize(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Takes a binary string and fits it to a final size by padding with leading 0s.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Base.Utility.GetCommonItemList``1(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0})
member.summary: Takes two lists and returns the common items between them as a list.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Unsafe row to get info from.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.DomainConfig
member.summary: Gets domainConfig.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.DomainExists(System.String)
member.summary: Returns whether a domain exists or not.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.IsDomainEnabled(System.String)
member.summary: Returns whether a domain is enabled or not.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.GetDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a domain found via its name.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.IsDomainGroup(System.String)
member.summary: Returns if a name is a domainGroup or not.
member.returns: True if name is a domain group.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.GetDomainList(System.String)
member.summary: Gets the domain list of a given domain group name.
member.returns: List of domain names in the group.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.GetAllDomainGroups
member.summary: Gets all domain groups available.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.TryGetDomainGroup(System.String,Prime.VoltageService.ConfigurationFiles.Structures.Domains.DomainGroup@)
member.summary: Tries to get a Domain group. Bool is true if found and out var is not null.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.GetDomainGroupName(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Gets the domain group name of a given domain name and a list of possible domainGroups.
member.param: Domain name to find group name of.
member.returns: Group name of the domain if found, otherwise empty.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler.GetDomainsByInitialPatMod(System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String})
member.summary: Gets the domains filtered by an initial PatMod.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData
member.summary: Class intended to manage and prepare FIVR domain's data for execution of the voltage values. This class resolves: - Grouping of dependent domains. - Managing of negative input values. - Repeated domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.DomainValues
member.summary: Gets or sets list of domain values.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.GetConfigurationNames
member.summary: Gets the configurations and regex names.
member.returns: List of configuration and regex pairs.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.GetDomainNames
member.summary: Gets list of domain names.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.GetDomainsPerPatModConfig
member.summary: Gets domains per patmod configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.SetDomainValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Sets up the domain values right before applying. Does some processing to make sure values are proper.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.GetCurrentResolvedValuesPerDomain
member.summary: Gets the current values for each domain. This filters domain groups and disabled domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.UpdateValues(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary: Updates values with a new set of values based on domain name.
member.param: Dictionary of domain name and new value.
member.exception: If a target is not valid.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.DomainExecutionData.GetTargetDomains
member.summary: `Target domains` does not mean that the returned domains are all the indicated by the initialDomainFilter parameter. The latter is the base of the target domains, because domain groups and other domains, that share the same initial voltage patmod config, are considered too.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.FivrVoltageBase
member.summary: Basic functionality used by all Fivr objects.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.Base.FivrVoltageBase.ValueRecord
member.summary: Gets or sets value record.
Applies domains.

member.summary: Populates the configuration handlers from patConfig.

member.summary: Gets or sets initial value.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether offset sign is positive or negative.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether offset sign should be inverted..

member.summary: Gets or sets offset fuse magnitude.

member.summary: Gets or sets a domain value.

member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomain
member.summary: Fivr Domain class.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomain.#ctor(Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.DataStructures.FivrObjectParameters,Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainAndConditionWithRails
member.summary: Supports FivrDomains and conditions with the use of rails.
Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor
member.summary: Class in charge of executing FivrDomains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.#ctor(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.PopulateConfigHandlers(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Tuple{System.String,System.String}},System.String)
member.summary: Populates the configuration handlers required for the pattern modifications.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.CalculateFuseValues(System.Collections.Generic.List{Prime.VoltageService.ConfigurationFiles.Structures.Domains.Domain},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Calculates Fuse values for given domains and values. Methodology varies if independent domains or dependent.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.ApplyFuseValues
member.summary: Applies the calculated fuse values.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.Reset
member.summary: Resets.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.GetFuseValuesForDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Get the fuse values for the given domain name.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.GetCalibratedValueForSingleFuse(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.Boolean)
member.summary: FIVR in 7nm uses a single fuse which the value to apply needs to be calibrated. Currently a single fuse means 7nm FIVR is in use. Example: 8 bits for a 7nm fuse. DAC value should be calibrated to the medium value hence max value of 8 bits is 256 and medium or half would be 128. 128 is the calibration value. Hence formula is 2 power of N bits - 1.
member.param: Current sign of input value. Positive or negative.
member.returns: Calibrated value for single fuse (7nm FIVR).

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainExecutor.GetBinaryString(System.Int64,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a binary string for a given value into a desired size. Resulting string can be repeated on demand.
member.param: Number of repeats, should be 1 for most cases.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainsAndCondition
member.summary: Class supports both Fivr domain and Fivr condition capabilities.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrDomainsAndCondition.#ctor(Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.DataStructures.FivrObjectParameters,Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.DataStructures.FivrObjectParameters,Prime.VoltageService.DomainConfigurationHandler,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrFusesCalculator
member.summary: Class is in charge of calculating fuse values for FIVR.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrFusesCalculator.GetFuseValuesForIndependentDomains(Prime.VoltageService.ConfigurationFiles.Structures.Domains.Domain,System.Double,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Calculates a Fuse for the case when domains are independent.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrFusesCalculator.GetFuseValuesUsingVidOffsetMethod(Prime.VoltageService.ConfigurationFiles.Structures.Domains.Domain,System.Double,System.Double,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Calculates fuse values for a dependent domain that requires VID offset methodology.
member.param: Value actually desired for this Fivr.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.FIVR.FivrFusesCalculator.GetFuseValuesUsingCalibrationOffsetMethod(Prime.VoltageService.ConfigurationFiles.Structures.Domains.Domain,System.Double,System.Double,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Calculates fuse values for a dependent domain that requires CALIBRATION offset methodology.
member.param: Value actually desired for this Fivr.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.Internal.IVoltageService
member.summary: Prime Internal usages of VoltageService.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService
member.summary:
Handles all voltages applications to the DUT(DPS, VDAC, FIVR, DLVR, etc..)
For deeper details of this service, see the sdk.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService.CreateVForceForPinAttribute(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String}},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new DPS voltage test object to apply voltages to dps pins.
member.param: A list containing the names of the DPS pins.
The attributes and its values per pin to apply with the application of the VForce.
The session context of this operation.
member.exception: Missing attributes for a pin. Empty pin list. A pin does not exist.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS voltage object to modify a provided test condition voltage value for the given pins.
member.param: A list containing the names of the DPS pins.
The attributes and its values per pin to apply with the application of the VForce.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttribute object configured to provided and .
member.exception: Missing attributes for a pin. Empty pin list. A pin does not exist. Test condition does not exist.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService.CreateFivrForDomains(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new FIVR voltage test object to apply voltages to FIVR domains or domain groups.
member.param: A list containing the FIVR domain names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IFivrDomains object to the FIVR features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Plist does not exist. Domain does not exist. Domain group does not exist. Empty list of domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService.CreateFivrForCondition(System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new FIVR voltage test object to apply voltages to FIVR domains specified in the FIVR condition definition.
member.param: The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IFivrCondition object to the FIVR features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Plist does not exist. Condition name does not exist.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService.CreateFivrForDomainsAndCondition(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new FIVR voltage test object to apply voltages to FIVR domains and supports targeting a FIVR condition.
member.param: A list containing the FIVR domain names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IFivrDomainsAndCondition interface to the FIVR features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Plist does not exist. Condition name does not exist. Domain does not exist. Domain group does not exist. Domain list empty.

member.summary: Creates a new FIVR voltage test object to apply FIVR domains, targeting a FIVR condition and supports applying rails configurations.
member.param: A list containing the FIVR domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
Pin attributes for every dlvr pin.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IFivrDomainsAndConditionWithRails object to the FIVR features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Plist does not exist. Condition name does not exist. Domain does not exist. Domain group does not exist. Domain list empty. Rail configuration does not exist. Missing pin attributes for DLVR.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltageService.CreateFivrDomainsAndConditionWithRails(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Creates a new FIVR voltage test object to apply FIVR domains, targeting a FIVR condition and supports applying rails configurations as long as DLVR are not used.
member.param: A list containing the FIVR domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names except DLVR.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IFivrDomainsAndConditionWithRails object to the FIVR features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Plist does not exist. Condition name does not exist. Domain does not exist. Domain group does not exist. Domain list empty. Rail configuration does not exist. Using a DLVR configuration..

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains and applying rail configurations.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Plist does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Rail configurations do not exist. Missing DLVR attributes.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains and applying rail configurations as long as DLVR is not used.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Plist does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Rail configurations do not exist. Using DLVR rail configuration.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains and applying rail configurations.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Rail configurations do not exist. Missing DLVR attributes.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains and applying rail configurations as long as DLVR is not used.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Rail configurations do not exist. Using DLVR rail configuration.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains to edit a test condition voltage value. Supports applying rail configurations.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Plist does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Test condition does not exist. Rail configurations do not exist. Missing DLVR attributes..

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains to edit a test condition voltage value. Supports applying rail configurations except DLVR.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Plist does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Test condition does not exist. Rail configurations do not exist.

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains to edit a test condition voltage value. Supports applying rail configurations.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Test condition does not exist. Rail configurations do not exist. Missing DLVR attributes..

member.summary: Creates a new DPS domain voltage object to apply DPS domains to edit a test condition voltage value. Supports applying rail configurations except DLVR configurations.
member.param: A list containing the DPS domain names.
A list containing the rail configuration names.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttributeWithRails interface to the DPS features from the VoltageService .
member.exception: Domain does not exist. Domain pin attributes missing. Test condition does not exist. Rail configurations do not exist..

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to dps pins or domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage.GetAppliedValuesPerTarget
member.summary: Gets the applied value per target.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage.Reset
member.summary: Reset the calculated or saved data from the previous applies.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVoltage.Restore
member.summary: Restore the voltages to the initial values (when the test object was created).

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IVForcePinAttribute
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to dps pins or domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVForcePinAttribute.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Applies the specified list of voltages to the corresponding pins or domains.
member.param: Voltage values for the pin or domain.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVForcePinAttribute.GetRestoreValues
member.summary: Returns the current restore values for the corresponding pins.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrDomains
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to dps pins or domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrDomains.Apply(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Double})
member.summary: Applies the specified list of voltages to the corresponding pins or domains.
member.param: Voltage values for the pin or domain.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrCondition
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to domains.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrCondition.ApplyConditionWithOverride(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Double})
member.summary: Applies the specified list of voltages to the corresponding domains. This method can override the values specified in the configuration file.
member.param: Values by domain name to override.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrCondition.ApplyCondition
member.summary: Applies the voltages indicated in the FIVR condition.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrCondition.GetCurrentResolvedValuesPerDomain
member.summary: Gets the current resolved value per domain considering guardband values.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrDomainsAndCondition
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to domains.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrDomainsAndConditionWithRails
member.summary: A voltage test object to apply voltages to domains, conditions and executes a rail configuration.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IFivrDomainsAndConditionWithRails.OverrideDlvrExpression(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Changes the expression name of a DLVR pin to the new given expression via name.

member.name: T:Prime.VoltageService.IVForcePinAttributeWithRails
member.summary: Creates a new DPS voltage test object with rail configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.IVForcePinAttributeWithRails.OverrideDlvrExpression(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Changes the expression name of a DLVR pin to the new given expression via name.

member.summary: Gets the restore value.

member.summary: Gets the current value.

member.summary: Gets PinName.

member.summary: Gets PinAttributes.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.Clean
member.summary: Cleans the object values.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.Apply(System.Double)
member.summary: Applies the given value if its not already applied.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.ApplyMethodology(System.Double)
member.summary: Defines the apply methodology to be used. to be defined by inheriting classes.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.GetRestoreValueInitialState
member.summary: Gets restore value but forcing initial state check in case it was not done already.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.Restore
member.summary: Restores VForce value to the restore value.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.ApplyVForcePinAttribute(System.Double)
member.summary: Applies voltage via setting the VForce attribute to the DPS pin.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.Pin.Base.DpsVoltageBase.SetInitialState
member.summary: Only set up the initial value if nothing has been applied before.

The attributes and its values per pin to apply with the application of the VForce.

member.summary: Creates a new TestCondition voltage test object to apply the voltage value of a TestCondition.

The attributes and its values per pin to apply with the application of the VForce.
The name of the test condition to apply.
The session context of this operation.
member.returns: IVForcePinAttribute interface to the TestCondition features from the VoltageService.

member.summary: Manages applying timing attributes to hardware pins.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Applies the timing attributes.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.RailConfigurations.TimingAttributeHandler.SetPinNames(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Sets the active pin names and updates relevant information to use them.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.RailConfigurations.TimingAttributeHandler.HasActiveConfigurations
member.summary: Indicates whether there are any active configurations.

member.name: M:Prime.VoltageService.RailConfigurations.TimingAttributeHandler.Restore
member.summary: Restores the attributes to their original values.

member.summary: Does a config exist.
